## Checklist

- [ ] Uses `https://apinode.pro` as the base URL.
- [ ] Uses `gpt-5.5` where a default model is needed.
- [ ] Uses environment variables or secrets for API keys.
- [ ] Does not include API keys, tokens, account IDs, or private URLs.
- [ ] Keeps claims factual and avoids benchmark or performance promises unless linked to reproducible data.
